results.rendered_html:
saṃ-√smṛ P. -smarati, to remember fully, recollect (acc.; rarely gen.),  Mn. ;  MBh.  &c.:
Caus. -smārayati or -smarayati, to cause to remember, remind of (acc.),  MBh. ;  Kāv.  &c.;
to cause to be remembered, recall to the mind of (gen.),  MBh. ;  BhP.

results.rendered_html:
saṃsmṛ 1 P.
1 To remember, think of, call to mind; smara saṃsmṛtya na śāṃtirasti me  Ku. 4. 17 ;  Bg. 18. 76 ;  Ms. 4. 149. 
2 To recollect fully.
— Caus. To remind, put in mind of; (pātālaṃ) māmadya saṃsmarayatīva bhujaṃgalokaḥ  Ratn. 1. 13.
